final_prompt.prompt:
Create a fictional social media screenshot mockup of a TikTok (抖音) live stream featuring a young woman resembling a "fairy sister" (神仙姐姐) style celebrity.

Style/medium: needs a realistic mobile screenshot aesthetic — exact UI detail execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, full-screen TikTok live stream interface with typical live stream UI overlays (viewer count, comments, gift animations, username bar)
Subject: must include a young woman with an ethereal, fairy-like appearance holding up a handwritten or printed sign with both hands
Scene/backdrop: needs a live stream room atmosphere — exact background decor is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, flattering live stream lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the subject; must include typical 抖音 live stream UI text elements (e.g. 直播中, viewer count placeholder)
Constraints: must preserve the 9:16 aspect ratio; sign text must be clearly legible; TikTok/抖音 live stream UI layout must be recognizable
Avoid: must avoid any real celebrity likeness; must avoid blurry or illegible sign text
